shortName: Blockchain Proof Mandate & Due Diligence Lab
title: GoalOS Signoff Pro — Blockchain Proof Mandate & Due Diligence Lab v29
subtitle: Turn the blockchain credibility idea into a requirement everyone can ask for, score, and enforce.
headline: Require the proof package.
oneLiner: Blockchain projects should not just ask for trust. They should pass proof-based due diligence.
tagline: No proof package, no serious trust. No validation, no settlement. No receipt, no credibility.
v28Bridge: v28 says blockchain projects need proof. v29 gives every stakeholder a beautiful proof request, due-diligence scorecard, and policy template to require it.
publicSiteRule: No forms, no inputs, no uploads, no cookies, no analytics, no wallets, no payments, no personal or confidential data.

stakeholders.name: Community user
stakeholders.ask: Before I trust this claim, where is the proof package?
stakeholders.requires: Public proof package URL, readable summary, current decision state.

stakeholders.name: DAO delegate
stakeholders.ask: Before I vote yes, what evidence supports the proposal?
stakeholders.requires: Mission contract, evidence docket, validation note, risk ledger, receipt boundary.

stakeholders.name: Grant committee
stakeholders.ask: Before a payout, did the milestone pass acceptance?
stakeholders.requires: Acceptance criteria, proof mapping, reviewer signoff, payout readiness receipt.

stakeholders.name: Treasury council
stakeholders.ask: Before funds move, what proves the vendor earned them?
stakeholders.requires: Deliverable evidence, replay notes, authority decision, settlement gate.

stakeholders.name: Security reviewer
stakeholders.ask: Before closure, can the fix be independently checked?
stakeholders.requires: Finding map, patch evidence, test output, residual risk, challenge window.

stakeholders.name: Investor or partner
stakeholders.ask: Before diligence passes, what proof supports the project’s material claims?
stakeholders.requires: Claims matrix, proof status, unresolved risks, receipts, governance boundary.

stakeholders.name: Enterprise procurement
stakeholders.ask: Before approval, does the project meet institutional evidence standards?
stakeholders.requires: RFP proof checklist, responsible owners, audit trail, redaction boundary.

stakeholders.name: AI-agent operator
stakeholders.ask: Before the agent is paid or reused, what ProofBundle validates the work?
stakeholders.requires: Task trace, tool scope, validator review, signed receipt, reusable capability gate.

proofRequirements.label: Public proof package URL
proofRequirements.plainEnglish: A single public place to inspect the claim and its evidence.
proofRequirements.blockIfMissing: The claim remains marketing, not diligence-ready.

proofRequirements.label: Mission contract
proofRequirements.plainEnglish: What was promised, by whom, under what acceptance criteria.
proofRequirements.blockIfMissing: No one can tell whether the work was actually complete.

proofRequirements.label: Evidence docket
proofRequirements.plainEnglish: Artifacts, commits, reports, hashes, provenance, and boundaries.
proofRequirements.blockIfMissing: The project has claims, but no structured proof.

proofRequirements.label: Replay path
proofRequirements.plainEnglish: How another reviewer can check the result again.
proofRequirements.blockIfMissing: The work cannot graduate from assertion to reviewable evidence.

proofRequirements.label: Validator review
proofRequirements.plainEnglish: What independent or role-specific review passed, failed, or challenged.
proofRequirements.blockIfMissing: The claim should not become mature or settlement-ready.

proofRequirements.label: Risk ledger
proofRequirements.plainEnglish: Known limitations, unresolved risks, rollback path, and challenge window.
proofRequirements.blockIfMissing: Stakeholders cannot price or govern the remaining risk.

proofRequirements.label: Human authority
proofRequirements.plainEnglish: Who accepted, rejected, or held the claim.
proofRequirements.blockIfMissing: No release, payout, upgrade, or public reliance should occur.

proofRequirements.label: Signed receipt
proofRequirements.plainEnglish: A durable decision record with hash commitments and boundary language.
proofRequirements.blockIfMissing: No serious credibility or settlement readiness.

scenarios.name: DAO grant payout
scenarios.trustEvent: A team asks for the next grant tranche.
scenarios.requiredDecision: Release only after milestone evidence maps to acceptance criteria and reviewer signoff.

scenarios.name: Protocol upgrade vote
scenarios.trustEvent: A governance proposal claims an upgrade is ready.
scenarios.requiredDecision: Vote only after simulation, risk ledger, replay notes, rollback path, and human authority are visible.

scenarios.name: Audit remediation closeout
scenarios.trustEvent: A project says the critical finding is fixed.
scenarios.requiredDecision: Close only after patch evidence, tests, reproduction notes, and reviewer challenge status are recorded.

scenarios.name: AI-agent settlement
scenarios.trustEvent: An autonomous worker asks to be paid or reused.
scenarios.requiredDecision: Settle only after ProofBundle, tool trace, validator report, and signed acceptance receipt.

scenarios.name: RWA attestation
scenarios.trustEvent: A real-world asset claim asks for public reliance.
scenarios.requiredDecision: Rely only after provenance, redaction boundary, reviewer packet, and receipt boundary are clear.

scenarios.name: Treasury vendor payment
scenarios.requiredDecision: Pay only after deliverable evidence, authority signoff, and settlement readiness receipt.

scenarios.name: Ecosystem partner approval
scenarios.trustEvent: A project claims an integration or partnership milestone.
scenarios.requiredDecision: Approve only after integration evidence, replay path, joint acceptance, and claim maturity state.

scenarios.name: Exchange/listing diligence
scenarios.trustEvent: A project asks a marketplace, exchange, or partner to rely on its claims.
scenarios.requiredDecision: Proceed only after material claims have proof status, risk notes, and signed receipts.

decisionStates.meaning: The project made an assertion without a full proof package.
Stakeholders have asked for the proof package.
Evidence exists, but replay or validation is incomplete.
Some proof exists, but risk, challenge, or authority is unresolved.
Mission, evidence, replay, validation, authority, and receipt are aligned.
decisionStates.publicAnswer: The claim is credibility-ready and settlement-ready in the demo.

boundary.claimBoundary: Public-safe synthetic demonstration of a proof requirement and due-diligence standard. It is not financial advice, legal advice, investment advice, production certification, an audit, a wallet, escrow, exchange, broker, custodian, or live settlement system.
notClaimed: legal, financial, tax, or investment advice
